questions.question: John writes to whom?
options: The elect lady and her children
questions.correct: The elect lady and her children
questions.feedback: John writes to the elect lady and her children.

questions.question: John warns against receiving into your house anyone who does what?
options: Does not bring the teaching of Christ
questions.correct: Does not bring the teaching of Christ
questions.feedback: Do not receive anyone who does not bring the teaching of Christ.

questions.question: John says many deceivers have gone out into the world.
questions.feedback: Many deceivers have gone out into the world who do not acknowledge Jesus Christ.

questions.question: John's command is that we _____ one another, which has been from the beginning.
questions.feedback: The command from the beginning is that we love one another.

questions.question: Watch out that you do not lose what we have worked for, but that you may be rewarded _____.
questions.feedback: Watch out so you do not lose what you have worked for but may be fully rewarded.
